_note: Swap to task:edit_image and add inputs[] once the owner drops a site-1 before-photo into PROJECTS/annas-farm/reference/. Until then this is a representative 'before' placeholder.

scene.description: A photorealistic wide daytime exterior of a 3,500 square foot irregular polygon residential common-space entry area in Lafayette Colorado suburban Front Range, Boulder County. The ground is compacted tan soil with patchy weeds, scattered construction debris, a few stray rocks, and dry litter. No landscaping has been installed yet. A low stucco boundary wall or simple block edging frames the space at the back of frame. Mature cottonwoods and blue spruces line the distance.
scene.weather: clear blue sky, high Front Range alpine haze with Flatirons visible in the distance
scene.location: Lafayette, Colorado, Boulder County (40.0004 N, -105.110 W)

materials.type: compacted tan native soil, patchy weeds, construction debris, dry brush
low stucco wall or concrete block edging, weathered buff color

camera.framing: eye-level wide shot, rule of thirds, back wall on upper third, horizon slightly tilted down

composition.background: stucco wall and distant cottonwoods and scrub oak

style.reference: MLS listing photo, natural color, no filter

include: crisp architectural edges on the back wall
